manualFeatureAssessment.appFirstOpenLifecycle: implemented first pass with cold-start firstOpenMotion state, root/screen-host data-motion-first-open-* attributes, tokenized enter CSS, automatic settle, and reduced-motion immediate settle; media and background-resume proof still missing
manualFeatureAssessment.globalMotionStateController: minimum transaction controller only; visual lifecycle still missing
manualFeatureAssessment.routePushPopMotionLifecycle: controller transaction implemented; visual enter/exit still missing
manualFeatureAssessment.tabIndicatorMotionLifecycle: main tab, reader module tab, and segmented control data-state adapters implemented; media evidence still missing
manualFeatureAssessment.dropdownMotionController: trigger/menu/option state adapter implemented; collapse persistence, A-to-B media evidence, and resize/orientation reposition evidence still missing
manualFeatureAssessment.coverToImmersiveSharedTransition: source/target state adapter and cover snapshot implemented; detail/chapter coverage and media evidence still missing
manualFeatureAssessment.readerControlHandleDrag: press/drag/release adapter implemented for control and full-page grabbers; media evidence and real-device long-path drag proof still missing
manualFeatureAssessment.readerGrabberLongPressDrag: implemented first pass for wide fixed-width dock; media, real-device touch, and fold proof still missing
manualFeatureAssessment.readerControlDockBoundsAndPersistence: implemented first pass with frame/group bounds, viewport-class saved offsets, and resize clamp/rebound; fold pane and safe-area device proof still missing
manualFeatureAssessment.readerSessionCapsuleEnterExitTickVoicePu: implemented first pass with capsule state adapter, tokenized enter/update/switch/tick/voice CSS, and local auto-page countdown updates; media and stop/exit interruption proof still missing
manualFeatureAssessment.capsuleRunPauseMorph: implemented first pass for local play/pause button state and control-layer running space; full matched morph media evidence still missing
manualFeatureAssessment.motionInterruptLifecycle: implemented first pass with motion.interrupt.cancel/redirect/completeThenReplace contract IDs, startMotionInterrupt root/screen-host data-motion-interrupt-* attributes, transient pressed/drag/dropdown cleanup, route/tab/viewport/loading/dock-drag/pointer-cancel entrypoints, tokenized interrupt settle CSS, and coverage gate; overlay close, dropdown A-to-B, async result priority, focus restore, and media proof still missing
manualFeatureAssessment.orientationPrepareReshapeSettleLifecycle: implemented first pass with startViewportOrientationMotion, root/screen-host data-motion-orientation-* attributes, route/session/overlay/focus/dock metadata, tokenized reshape/anchor-settle CSS, reduced-motion immediate settle, dropdown reanchor, and wide dock clamp; real rotation media, fold posture, text-anchor repagination, and focus automation proof still missing

componentFamilies.currentState: Cold-start first render now exposes app.firstOpen.enter transaction, firstOpenMotion one-shot state, root/screen-host data-motion-first-open-* attributes, tokenized 280ms enter CSS, automatic settle, and reduced-motion immediate settle; default/deep-link media evidence and background-resume proof remain missing.
Motion ID and controller transaction exist, but render is still immediate innerHTML replacement except Reader inline loading.

Main tab, reader module tab, and segmented control now expose data-motion-tab-* / data-motion-segment-* state, tab.item.press/select/switch and segment.item.switch press IDs, and reader.module.switch / segment.item.switch transactions; media evidence remains missing.
Generic pressed state exists; semantic activate/commit feedback is not complete for plain business buttons.
Motion IDs exist for many selectors; selection-switch state machine is not unified.

componentFamilies.source: filterDisclosure, settings option dropdown, reader more/tts/settings dropdowns
componentFamilies.currentState: Trigger, menu, and option elements now expose data-motion-dropdown-* state, dropdown.option.press press IDs, tokenized CSS, and expand/select controller transactions; collapse persistence, A-to-B media evidence, and resize/orientation reposition proof remain missing.

Cover and action entries now expose data-motion-entry-* state, cover snapshot, target reader reveal, and reduced-motion fallback; detail/chapter coverage, repeated-click interruption, and media evidence remain missing.

Wide fixed-width dock now exposes long-press, drag, release, and rebound state, moves the sheet + module nav dock by transform, persists offset by viewport class, clamps against ReaderFrame/group bounds, and clears transforms outside movable layouts; media, real-device touch, fold-pane, and rotation interruption evidence remain missing.

TTS and auto-page session start transactions now drive a first-pass immersive capsule adapter with data-motion-session-capsule-* states, enter/update/switch/exit IDs, local countdown tick scheduling, control button press/toggle state, and TTS voice active pulse; media, stop/exit interruption, reduced-motion capture, and matched morph proof remain missing.

Reader control layer now exposes a first-pass running space for active TTS/auto-page sessions with data-motion-control-space-* states, enter/update/exit IDs, countdown/voice/control subroles, continued auto-page tick scheduling, and reduced-motion token fallback; matched capsule-to-space media evidence and stop/exit interruption proof remain missing.

componentFamilies.source: startMotionInterrupt, route/Tab/viewport/loading/dock drag/pointer cancel entrypoints, data-motion-interrupt-*
componentFamilies.currentState: Interrupt now exposes a first-pass adapter for cancel, redirect, and completeThenReplace with root/screen-host state, transient pressed/drag/dropdown cleanup, tokenized interrupt settle CSS, and coverage gate; overlay close, dropdown A-to-B, async result priority, focus restore, and media evidence remain missing.

Viewport/orientation now exposes a first-pass prepare/reshape/settle adapter with root and screen-host data-motion-orientation-* state, route/session/overlay/focus/dock metadata, tokenized reshape/anchor-settle CSS, reduced-motion immediate settle, dropdown reanchor, and wide dock clamp; real rotation media, fold posture, text-anchor repagination, overlay/focus automation, and platform-device proof remain missing.
